related.name: ♃ Jupiter

related.teaser: The Hierophant is the bridge of law — voice of the sacred order, keeper of ancient ways.

related.name: ᛞ Dagaz
related.teaser: Dagaz is the turning of the sky—the hinge where night exhales and the day inhales.
